rationale: The stated field 'probability theory / mathematical statistics' is a genuinely different specific field from the reference's 'mathematical physics', so field_match fails. The stated mechanism denotes the same specific machinery as the reference: deforming a symmetric-algebra/bialgebra product by a bilinear form (covariance) applied across coproduct-split pieces and reassembled — the Wick-pairings/moment-cumulant view of exactly the Hopf-algebraic cliffordization / cocycle-twist the reference describes — so mechanism_match holds. Since only one of the two matches, overall_equivalent is false.
